subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who attained unto the Most Great Ocean when the Ancient Sovereign appeared and quaffed the sealed wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی من فاز بالبحر الاعظم اذ اتی مالک القدم و شرب رحیق المختوم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
